---
title: "Research"
---

My research focuses on valuation and value investing, and on connecting fundamental analysis with quantitative methods, data analytics, and machine learning for prediction and decision-making.

## Published & Forthcoming Papers

::: {.publication}
**Valuation and Returns on Stock Return Volatility**  
M.R. Lyle  
[*The Accounting Review*]{.publication-meta}, 2025, Vol. 100, Issue 2.  
[[SSRN](https://ssrn.com/abstract=2696183)]
:::

::: {.publication}
**Measuring Portfolio Gains: The Case of Earnings Announcement Trading Signals**  
*with T. Yohn*  
[*The Accounting Review*]{.publication-meta}, 2024, Vol. 99, Issue 4.  
[[SSRN](https://ssrn.com/abstract=4063271)]
:::

::: {.publication}
**Changes in Risk Factor Disclosures and the Variance Risk Premium**  
*with E. Riedl and F. Siano*  
[*The Accounting Review*]{.publication-meta}, 2023, Vol. 98, Issue 6.  
[[SSRN](https://ssrn.com/abstract=4090024)]
:::

::: {.publication}
**Expected Stock Returns Worldwide: A Log-Linear Present-Value Approach**  
*with A. Chattopadhyay and C.C.Y. Wang*  
[*The Accounting Review*]{.publication-meta}, 2022, Vol. 97, Issue 2.  
[[SSRN](https://ssrn.com/abstract=3129086)]
:::

::: {.publication}
**Fundamental Analysis and Mean-Variance Optimal Portfolios**  
*with T. Yohn*  
[*The Accounting Review*]{.publication-meta}, 2021, Vol. 96, Issue 6.  
[[SSRN](https://ssrn.com/abstract=3300976)]
:::

::: {.publication}
**The Term Structure of the Implied Costs of Equity Capital**  
*with J.L. Callen*  
[*Review of Accounting Studies*]{.publication-meta}, 2020, Vol. 25, Issue 1.  
[[SSRN](https://ssrn.com/abstract=1738401)]
:::

::: {.publication}
**Information Quality, Growth Options, and Average Future Stock Returns**  
M.R. Lyle  
[*The Accounting Review*]{.publication-meta}, 2019, Vol. 94, Issue 1.  
[[SSRN](https://ssrn.com/abstract=2437387)]
:::

::: {.publication}
**Implied Cost of Equity Capital Estimates as Predictors of Accounting Returns and Stock Returns**  
*with S. Larocque*  
[*Journal of Financial Reporting*]{.publication-meta}, 2017, Vol. 2, Issue 1.  
[[SSRN](https://ssrn.com/abstract=2370686)]
:::

::: {.publication}
**Discussion of Valuation: Accounting for Risk and the Expected Return**  
M.R. Lyle  
[*Abacus*]{.publication-meta}, 2016, Vol. 52, Issue 1. Invited discussion for special issue on valuation.
:::

::: {.publication}
**The Cross Section of Expected Holding Period Returns and Their Dynamics: A Present Value Approach**  
*with C.C.Y. Wang*  
[*Journal of Financial Economics*]{.publication-meta}, 2015, Vol. 116, Issue 3.  
[[SSRN](https://ssrn.com/abstract=2182628)]
:::

::: {.publication}
**Dynamic Risk, Accounting-Based Valuation, and Firm Fundamentals**  
*with J.L. Callen and R.J. Elliott*  
[*Review of Accounting Studies*]{.publication-meta}, 2013, Vol. 18, Issue 4.  
[[SSRN](https://ssrn.com/abstract=2025959)]
:::

## Working Papers

::: {.publication}
**The Differential Market Reaction to Pre-Open versus Post-Close Earnings Announcements**  
*with A. Stephan and T. Yohn*  
[[SSRN](https://ssrn.com/abstract=3064160)]
:::

::: {.publication}
**Re-Adjusted Financial Statement Data: Challenges in Replicating Research**  
*with F. Siano and T. Yohn*  
[[SSRN](https://ssrn.com/abstract=5107985)]
:::

::: {.publication}
**Connecting Expected Stock Returns to Accounting Valuation Multiples: A Primer**  
*with A. Chattopadhyay and C.C.Y. Wang*  
[[SSRN](https://ssrn.com/abstract=3774442)]
:::

## Publications in Other Areas

::: {.publication}
**Trading Volume and Open Interest from Options Markets as Measures of the Effect of IT Announcements**  
*with D. Zhang and B. Nault*  
[*Information Technology & Management*]{.publication-meta}, 2024, Vol. 25, Issue 2.
:::

::: {.publication}
**A Model for Energy Pricing with Stochastic Emission Costs**  
*with R.J. Elliott and H. Miao*  
[*Energy Economics*]{.publication-meta}, 2010, Vol. 32, Issue 4.
:::

::: {.publication}
**A "Simple" Hybrid Model for Power Derivatives**  
*with R.J. Elliott*  
[*Energy Economics*]{.publication-meta}, 2009, Vol. 31, Issue 5.
:::

## Recent Invited Talks

- **2026:** Florida International University, Hong Kong University (scheduled)
- **2025:** University of Utah, Humboldt University of Berlin
- **2024:** Yale, Texas A&M
- **2023:** UC Berkeley, Liberty Advisor Group, RAST Conference (discussant)

A complete list of invited presentations is available in my [CV](cv.qmd).
